6: %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds nuw i8, ptr %a, i32 %i.0, !dbg !146
9: %call = call fastcc zeroext i8 @mul_f(i8 noundef zeroext %0, i8 noundef zeroext %1) #4, !dbg !149
10: %call1 = call fastcc zeroext i8 @add_f(i8 noundef zeroext %call, i8 noundef zeroext %ret.0) #4, !dbg !150
12: %add.ptr = getelementptr inbounds nuw i8, ptr %b.addr.0, i32 1, !dbg !152
